code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws_byte(b)
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    return result
  end
  match list.min(xs)
  when Some(m)
    mut current = m
    result = list.push(result, current)
    mut done = false
    while not done
      mut best: Option<Int> = None
      mut j = 0
      while j < n
        match xs.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          if v > current
            match best
            when Some(bv)
              if v < bv
                best = Some(v)
              end
            when None
              best = Some(v)
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      match best
      when Some(bv)
        current = bv
        result = list.push(result, bv)
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_line(line1)
let ys = parse_line(line2)

mut combined = xs
mut k = 0
let ny = ys.len()
while k < ny
  match ys.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let sorted = sort_unique(combined)
println(format_list(sorted))
